headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Altria Group (MO) After Its Strong Recent Share Price Run?
summary: Wondering if Altria Group at around US$71.56 is still offering value or if most of the opportunity has already been priced in? This article walks through the numbers so you can judge how the current price stacks up against underlying fundamentals. The stock has returned 3.4% over the past week, 5.0% over the past month, 24.9% year to date, 30.8% over 1 year and very large gains over 3 and 5 years, which naturally raises questions about how much upside or downside remains.
